items.name: Spinach & Feta Cheese
items.description: A golden, flaky pastry generously filled with fresh, tender spinach and creamy feta cheese, perfectly seasoned with our signature house blend of exotic spices. Baked to perfection and served with our zesty cocktail sauce for the ultimate indulgence.

items.name: Chicken Pie
items.description: A masterpiece of culinary indulgence — tender ground chicken breast infused with a medley of exotic spices, slow-cooked to perfection for a rich, juicy flavor that melts in your mouth. Encased in a golden, buttery crust, every bite is a symphony of taste and texture — a true celebration of time, passion and art in the kitchen.

items.name: Shirazi Salad
items.description: A crisp and refreshing garden medley of cucumber, tomato, onion, carrot, radish and tender lettuce — drizzled with extra virgin olive oil and freshly squeezed lemon juice. A light yet vibrant salad, bursting with color and flavor, crafted in true Afghan style.
